text: Surveillance drones detected suspicious movement of 3 unidentified individuals near the LOC in the Poonch sector. Thermal signatures suggest they are carrying heavy backpacks. Visibility is low.
Routine patrol conducted in Grid 45X, Ladakh region. No unusual activity observed. Local shepherd movement verified. Weather conditions clear.
Intercepted radio comms from Sector Alpha indicate potential infiltration attempt scheduled for tonight. Keywords 'crossing' and 'package' heard.
Supply convoy reached forward post in Uri sector without incident. Road conditions stable.
Significant buildup of troops observed across the border near Galwan Valley. Satellite imagery confirms 5 new temporary structures.
